title: Vitest baseline recovery
description: Triage and remediate the 198 vitest failures across 166 files surfaced after Unit A's full-repo run. Sampled failures sit in skill_advisor scorer, hooks, scaffold, alignment, code-graph — outside Unit A's surface — and pre-date this packet. Classify each failure into fixture-drift / runtime-regression / environmental / flaky; fix what's fixable; document the rest with explicit annotations.
